positive: A stylized illustration of a fantastical, bioluminescent jungle scene viewed through a mystical archway. Central composition features giant, stylized flora like glowing pitcher plants and oversized, elegant ferns. The color palette is dominated by deep sapphire blues, vibrant emerald greens, and electric turquoise accents, contrasted by soft, warm golden highlights emanating from fungal formations. Clean silhouettes are essential, giving a graphic, tattoo-like quality. The style should be highly detailed neo-Art Nouveau mixed with modern vector illustration, emphasizing flowing lines, organic shapes, and strong depth separation. The artwork must be centered and scalable for apparel print, focusing on clean linework and solid color blocking. Volumetric light diffusion, high contrast, perfect symmetry.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, border, blur, artifacts, extra limbs, lowres, low quality, bad anatomy, noisy, grunge, cartoon, photograph, photorealistic, grayscale
